moat_analysis.details: Excellent ROIC: >15% in 10/10 periods; Good pricing power: Average gross margin 69.0%; High capital requirements: Avg capex 17.9% of revenue; Invests in R&D, building intellectual property; Significant goodwill/intangible assets, suggesting brand value or IP

management_analysis.details: Moderate cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 0.71; Conservative debt management: D/E ratio of 0.12; Acceptable cash position: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.08; No insider trading data available; Stable share count: Limited dilution

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 4.3% avg growth with some volatility; Highly predictable operations: Operating income positive in all periods; Highly predictable margins: 44.3% avg with minimal volatility; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Expensive: Only 2.1% FCF yield; Expensive: 69.2% premium to reasonable value; Stable to growing FCF supports valuation
